name: gainable
description: Gainable harness control plane for OpenAI Codex — build, refine, and author code in Gainable apps. Bundles the gaia / gaia-code skills and a session-start orientation hook. Requires the gaia CLI: npm i -g @gainable.dev/cli.

interface.shortDescription: Build & refine Gainable apps from Codex
interface.longDescription: Drive the Gainable harness from Codex: build new apps from an idea or a spreadsheet, refine existing ones, or author app code yourself with the same validators the BuildAgent runs. Two skills — gaia (default, harness-driven, one cheap HTTP turn) and gaia-code (author-mode, pull a local mirror and push validated edits). Requires the gaia CLI on PATH (npm i -g @gainable.dev/cli).
defaultPrompt: Build a CRM app for tracking SaaS deals with Gainable.
Add KPI cards to the sponsors view.
